auto_fixes.question: (–2) + (–5) + (–6) _______ (–3) + (–4) + (–6)
auto_fixes.explanation: Left side: (–2)+(–5)+(–6)=–13; Right side: (–3)+(–4)+(–6)=–13. Since –13 = –13, the statement is true.
